sizeMemoryDescription: Share the Terminal split size across all workspaces, or remember it separately for each workspace.
fontSizeDescription: Adjust text in local and SSH terminals. Open terminals update immediately.
shellDescription: Choose the default profile used by New Terminal and Split. Windows profiles include Command Prompt, PowerShell, and installed WSL distributions.
customArgsHint: Enter one argv value per line. Spaces inside a line stay in the same argument.
imeDescription: Use the terminal cursor for normal shells, or a fixed visible input box for full-screen TUI programs whose real cursor is elsewhere.
emptyDescription: Open a new terminal to run commands here.
